arts.ttl: Newcastle United complete deal for winger in January breakthrough as rivals beaten to transfer
arts.sum: Already capped by the Republic of Ireland at youth level, Fitzgerald is believed to be highly-rated by the Magpies and deemed a player they see with a genuine pathway to the first-team. Academy chief Steve Harper does not want to simply stockpile players at the Academy and wants more to follow in the footsteps of Elliot Anderson, Sean Longstaff and Andy Carroll who worked their way up to the first-team from the youth system.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's important pledge to Newcastle United diehards as sickness-hit Spurs miss key men
arts.sum: Newcastle United chief Eddie Howe goes in against a Tottenham Hotspur team that has served goal-packed games in their last three home fixtures. Howe has spoken about entertaining the Newcastle fans brought up on Kevin Keegan and Sir Bobby Robson's forward thinking approach, but after going 2-0 up at Old Trafford, the United head coach smartly played a more cautious game to ensure a much-needed victory in the North-West.

arts.ttl: Fikayo Tomori 'done deal', two bargain options - Tottenham January transfer priority revealed - Alasdair Gold - football.london
arts.sum: Spurs just need a body through the door right now, whether that's someone with Premier League experience like Fikayo Tomori or another versatile type like Ko Itakura, they simply need someone to come in and help out for the next month or so. Postecoglou's defence is in a bad way right now with Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Ben Davies not back until later this month and Destiny Udogie out for at least six weeks.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Tottenham – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle travel to Tottenham in the Premier League this weekend looking to maintain their hot streak of form. Eddie Howe’s team have won four consecutive Premier League games over the festive period, without conceding a goal, to move into top-four contention. Alexander Isak has led the charge for the Magpies, having scored eight times in […] The post Newcastle XI vs Tottenham – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid and Inter set to compete for Atalanta’s Isak Hien
arts.sum: LaLiga outfits Atletico Madrid and Serie A giants Inter are in pursuit of Atalanta’s Isak Hien. According to a report by Tutto Atalanta, Atletico Madrid and Inter are gearing up…

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Newcastle – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur host Newcastle United in the Premier League this weekend. Ange Postecoglou is under pressure with Spurs’ season slipping away from them. The North Londoners have won just three of their last 13 games and sit closer to the relegation places than top four. Injuries have decimated Postecoglou’s squad and the Australian is without […] The post Tottenham vs Newcastle – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tottenham vs Newcastle – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Tottenham welcome Newcastle United to North London this Saturday lunchtime for both side’s first game of 2025. The hosts have only won once in their last seven league matches and face another challenging test with Newcastle in scintillating form. At his pre-match press conference, a beleaguered Ange Postecoglou announced that a virus has struck the […] The post Tottenham vs Newcastle – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Postecoglou says Spurs signing has ‘carried’ team this season
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has said Dominic Solanke has carried Tottenham ‘on his back’ for much of the current campaign. Spurs signed Solanke in a £65m club-record deal from Bournemouth in the summer and the forward has 10 goals and five assists in 25 appearances across all competitions. Injuries to Richarlison have meant that Spurs have lacked […] The post Postecoglou says Spurs signing has ‘carried’ team this season first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tyler Dibling transfer stance clear as huge offer made amid Newcastle United interest
arts.sum: Southampton are determined to keep 18-year-old sensation Tyler Dibling on the south coast amid interest from Newcastle United, Manchester United, West Ham United and other big clubs. He is still young and he has to concentrate only on training well and playing games.

arts.ttl: 'I'd love to': Ange Postecoglou says he really wants to rest four Tottenham players right now
